description_long: This is a modern, compact sofa upholstered in a textured blue fabric, featuring a minimalist and boxy silhouette. The sofa has thick, rectangular armrests that are the same height as the backrest, creating a uniform and geometric appearance. The seat and backrest cushions are integrated into the frame, with no visible separation or tufting, giving the sofa a seamless and monolithic look. The upholstery displays a subtle, fine ribbed or corduroy-like pattern, adding tactile interest to the otherwise solid color. The base of the sofa is fully enclosed, with no visible legs or underframe, contributing to its sturdy and grounded presence. This design is suitable for urban environments such as public waiting areas, lobbies, or outdoor covered spaces.
description: A boxy, blue sofa with integrated cushions, thick rectangular armrests, and a subtle ribbed upholstery pattern. The design is minimalist, with no visible legs and a solid, monolithic appearance.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thick, rectangular armrest and the continuous, attached backrest and seat.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the wide seat, uniform armrests, and the seamless, ribbed upholstery.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring the left, with the same armrest and backrest profile visible.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the solid, fully enclosed backrest and the absence of visible legs or frame.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Single, continuous seat and back cushions, both attached and uniform in size, with no visible separation or tufting.
attribute_armrest_style: Thick, rectangular armrests at both ends, matching the height of the backrest, with a straight, boxy profile and fully padded surface.
attribute_leg_design: No visible legs; the base is fully enclosed and flush with the ground, suggesting a hidden or platform support structure.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight, continuous backrest integrated with the sofa frame, with no segmentation or decorative features.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid blue color with a fine, ribbed or corduroy-like texture, no visible decorative stitching or patterning.
